query:
SELECT
      date,
      address,
      'Total balance' AS series,
      total_balance_usd,
      tokens_held,
      native_or_wrapped_xdai_balance,
      priced_balance_usd,
      priced_tokens_held
    FROM dbt.int_execution_account_balance_history_daily
    PREWHERE 1 = 1
      /*__FILTER_CONDITIONS__*/
    ORDER BY date
